text.message: watch out before giving sheep port
I think we want OJ on sheep port
So I’ll steal back from you
In th lead can’t trade you
blue is roads favorite and has better setup

imagine if u had given him the plow
Yeah need to solo that 8 wood asap
yeah imagine that 8 ore being open
Can we aggro knight him pleas
I need to fight army or we’re in trouble
He blocked our 8 o many times
Someone else needs to take road
Did he just say I’m winning

Yes look at my set up lol
i soloed him after stealing from you
Good for you you stole from last palc
Yep I’m so far ahead watch it
So far ahead of Oj and blue you’re right
now im in legit last probably
idk green seem to be doing fine
ok so trade wheat or ore
so what u want me to do then
no point in telling me the obvious if u can't help right?

green ill make sure you dont win

i think he's making sure of that already
It’s ok, not the end of the world lol
I’m watching the chiefs game settle down
so used to not moving it when it's not on me
Go king make I don’t care lol, we’ll live and move on
if you need something too im here
thanks but like don't give blue game please
he can win by himself anyway
Let him kingmake, just report him and move on lol
Nah I’m good, it’s just a game kiddo
Relax and go watch some football
Yeah I don’t care lol, do it
